embeds.title: Temperature Alert
embeds.description:
❄️ **[S02] TEMPERATURE ALERT** ❄️

**Current Temp:** -9000
**Action Required:** Keep furnaces fueled with coal!

⚠️ Frozen bases lose functionality
🔥 Use High-Heat Furnaces to stay warm
🏭 Check Alliance Furnace coverage

**Reminder:** Base temperature ranges from -15°C to -80°C. Don't let your base freeze!
